summary.intent: Address Codex automated review comments on PR #705 (fogodev/ars-ui Marquee component), push fixes, monitor CI to green, and trigger a second Codex review pass.
summary.outcome: Two rounds of fixes were committed and pushed (911d9523 and 'Preserve Marquee paused edge cases'). All reported Codex threads were resolved; most CI checks passed. Coverage, Release Verification, and Feature Flags Dioxus lanes were still running when the transcript ended.

repo: Codex automated review is triggered by posting `@codex review` as a PR comment; it signals active review with an `eyes` reaction and removes it when done.

CI pipeline fans out into many sequential stages: Formatting → Clippy → Snapshots → Integration Tests → Adapter Parity → I18n/DOM Browser Tests → Feature Flags (Core/I18n/Subsystems/Leptos/Dioxus) → Unit Tests → Coverage → Release Verification.
Coverage and Release Verification routinely run >5 minutes and are expected to be the last jobs to complete.
The Marquee state machine tracks multiple independent pause causes (hover, focus, interaction, manual); a resume requires all active causes to clear, not just the most recent one.
`cargo xtask spec compile-snippets` and `cargo xtask spec validate` are required pre-commit steps to keep the spec in sync with implementation.

code.finding: State transition logic for pause causes and loop exhaustion. Interaction-in while paused must only append to active causes (not resume); Pause event must clear pending interaction causes; prop sync for loop_count must pause when the machine is already past the new limit.

Finite loop exhaustion and on_props_changed implementation. SyncProps must be emitted for all context-backed props including disabled state, motion settings, pause policies, loop_count, auto_fill, and delay.
Spec section covering pause/resume and loop behavior; updated to encode the interaction-out-while-manually-paused and loop_count-shrink edge cases.

workflow: Codex review threads can be replied to and resolved via `gh api graphql` mutation `resolveReviewThread` using thread IDs from the GraphQL `reviewThreads` query.
Polling `gh pr checks 705 --watch=false` combined with `gh api repos/.../actions/runs/.../jobs` gives finer-grained per-job status than the checks surface alone.
`cargo llvm-cov test --summary-only` is a fast way to verify coverage locally before pushing.
Regression tests should be written first (failing) before fixing the implementation, to confirm the exact failure path matches the reported edge case.

friction: Extensive CI polling required — the full pipeline took well over 30 minutes end-to-end with no early-exit signal, requiring dozens of manual `gh pr checks` calls.

Codex second-pass review surfaced two additional edge cases (interaction-out resuming a manually-paused marquee; loop_count shrink leaving an already-exhausted machine playing), requiring a second full fix-test-commit cycle.
Clippy remote run was significantly slower than local, causing a long wait between Formatting passing and the downstream matrix being scheduled.
open_items: Coverage, Release Verification, and Feature Flags Dioxus CI jobs were still in progress at end of session — final green status unconfirmed.
Codex final approval reaction not yet received at transcript end; a third review pass may surface additional findings.
No snapshot updates were mentioned despite behavioral changes — worth verifying snapshot tests remain accurate after the pause-cause and loop-exhaustion fixes.
